name: openclaw_speed_v1
description: Short prompt set for measuring TTFT and decode speed on OpenClaw-like tasks.
notes: No pass/fail grading. The purpose is consistent latency and throughput capture.
Prompts are intentionally short to medium so model comparisons stay practical on one machine.

tasks.prompt: Explain in one short paragraph what DGX Spark is and why someone would benchmark local LLMs on it.
Return a compact JSON object with keys task, urgency, and next_step for this note.
tasks.context: User says a benchmark demo is on Friday, latency is unstable, and the next step is to compare qwen, gemma, and nemotron on the same machine.

tasks.prompt: List three concrete steps an OpenClaw-like agent should do next.
tasks.context: Inbox contains one urgent billing email, one calendar conflict tomorrow at 10:00, and one low-priority newsletter.
